title: Dumb Sh**
description: A dumb Minecraft mod that may or may not predict what will be added in the future. Who knows?
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c999686d4afc287715ec3faa98fc2e4a60812219.png)

# Welcome to the Dumb SH** mod!

This mod features various features, such as:

- White Pumpkins (Currently Unobtainable :P)
- Redstoning Table
- Quartz Wall
- More!!!

There's also some updated textures for the following gui:

- Anvil
- Beacon
- Brewing Stand
- Gamemode Switcher

**Mobs**

There are 2 mobs in this mod:

- Emerald Golem - Dumb little guy :D
- Wind Caller - New Illager that shoots tornados


**Experimental Features**

Some features are experimental. Though, right now its only the gears and generator.


**Recommended Sh****

I'd recommend installing the [**Updated Spawn Eggs**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/updated-spawn-egg/version/1.21.4) resource pack by **siresolo** since this mod features the updated spawn egg style but only supports 1.21.4.
